overall_summary: Brightwave is a creative-led agency proposing an integrated 'Mornings Made of Stars' platform covering strategy, creative, TVC development and production, organic social, and program management as one bundled engagement. It declines paid media planning/buying and gives conflicting total figures with no tax clarity or compliance detail.

scope_notes.value: Full platform, positioning, key visual and messaging matrix; described as their core strength.
scope_notes.evidence: the full platform, positioning, key visual and messaging matrix. This is our heartland

price.value: Bundled into all-in fee; no separate price
price.evidence: we've chosen to present this as an integrated partnership rather than nickel-and-diming every line

scope_notes.value: Three script routes, storyboards, director's treatment.
scope_notes.evidence: three script routes, storyboards, and a director's treatment

scope_notes.value: End-to-end production of hero 30s and two 10s cutdowns; child artists cast with care.
scope_notes.evidence: we will produce the hero 30s and the two 10s cutdowns end to end

scope_notes.value: Always-on organic content world for the first three months.
scope_notes.evidence: a beautiful always-on content world for the first three months

scope_notes.value: Declined; suggests a specialist partner.
scope_notes.evidence: paid media planning and buying is better handled by a specialist

line_item_coverage.line_item: Social paid media buying and optimization

scope_notes.value: Declined; offers light coordination only.
scope_notes.evidence: we can fold light coordination into our program management

line_item_coverage.line_item: Kids advertising and claims compliance review

scope_notes.value: Not addressed anywhere in the proposal.
Dedicated producer to hold the program together.
scope_notes.evidence: we'll hold the whole thing together with a dedicated producer

total_or_bundled_price.value: Conflicting: ₹2.4 Cr (= ₹240L) stated as all-in, but closing says closer to ₹2.6 Cr
total_or_bundled_price.evidence: Our all-in fee for the above is ₹2.4 Cr

pricing_model.value: Single bundled partnership fee, no per-item breakdown
pricing_model.evidence: an integrated partnership rather than nickel-and-diming every line

timeline.value: Roughly one quarter from appointment to air, give or take
timeline.evidence: roughly one quarter from appointment to air, give or take

assumptions: Nutriva provides brand guidelines and product samples
Approvals come through a single empowered client lead
Two rounds of revisions per deliverable
exclusions: Paid media planning and buying excluded from scope

flags.detail: Three figures appear: ₹2.4 Cr / ₹240L (same value) stated as all-in, then ~₹2.6 Cr in the closing. The total is internally inconsistent.
flags.evidence: our honest all-in number lands closer to ₹2.6 Cr

flags.detail: No statement on whether GST is included or excluded. RFQ explicitly requires this.
RFQ requires a per-line-item breakdown; vendor provides only a lump-sum bundle. May be non-compliant.
No response to the mandatory kids advertising / ASCI claims compliance requirement.
Timeline is vague ('roughly one quarter, give or take') with no milestones.
flags.evidence: roughly one quarter from appointment to air

overall_summary: MediaMetric is a performance-media agency that priced most line items in a clean rate card but omitted TVC production entirely and priced media buying as a percentage of an unspecified media budget. It gives a strong, specific ASCI compliance answer but its currency is internally inconsistent (USD rate card vs INR summary).

scope_notes.value: Comms strategy + creative platform.
scope_notes.evidence: Comms strategy + creative platform

price.evidence: Strategy & creative development | Comms strategy + creative platform | USD 28,000

scope_notes.value: Scripts, storyboards, treatment.
scope_notes.evidence: TVC development | Scripts, storyboards, treatment | USD 18,000

scope_notes.value: Explicitly not offered; vendor is not a production house.
scope_notes.evidence: We are not a production house. We have deliberately not quoted TVC production

scope_notes.value: Calendar + monthly asset packs + community management.
scope_notes.evidence: Calendar + monthly asset packs + community mgmt

scope_notes.value: Full media plan, targeting, forecast.
scope_notes.evidence: Full media plan, targeting, forecast | USD 12,000

line_item_coverage.line_item: Social paid media buying and optimization

scope_notes.value: Execution + weekly optimisation + reporting.
scope_notes.evidence: Execution + weekly optimisation + reporting

price.value: 12% of media spend — absolute cost unknowable without media budget
price.evidence: media management is charged at 12% of working media. The client sets the media budget separately

line_item_coverage.line_item: Kids advertising and claims compliance review

scope_notes.value: Independent ASCI review with per-asset log and final sign-off memo, owned by in-house standards lead.
scope_notes.evidence: reviewed against the ASCI Guidelines for Advertising to Children before release

scope_notes.value: PMO across workstreams.
scope_notes.evidence: Launch program management | PMO across workstreams | USD 7,500 / month

total_or_bundled_price.value: Conflicting: rate card in USD, but summary states ~₹62,00,000 for fixed components
total_or_bundled_price.evidence: Indicative total of fixed-fee components is approximately ₹62,00,000

currency.value: Inconsistent: USD in rate card, INR in summary

pricing_model.value: Per-line-item rate card + percentage-of-media for buying

kids_advertising_claims.value: Per-asset ASCI review before release, substantiation evidence on file, per-asset compliance log + final sign-off memo, in-house standards lead.
kids_advertising_claims.evidence: Every asset directed at children is reviewed against the ASCI Guidelines for Advertising to Children before release

general_compliance.value: Nutrition claims checked for substantiation with documented evidence.
general_compliance.evidence: all nutrition claims are checked for substantiation with documented evidence held on file

assumptions: Client provides all brand assets, product information, and creative approvals within 48 hours of request
Delays beyond 48h may affect performance commitments
exclusions: Media spend itself (only management fee quoted)

flags.detail: TVC production — a core RFQ line item — is entirely absent. Vendor cannot deliver the full launch alone.
flags.evidence: We have deliberately not quoted TVC production

flags.detail: Rate card is in USD but the commercials summary and total are in INR. Buyer cannot reconcile the total without an exchange rate and re-statement.
Media buying priced at 12% of media spend, but the media budget is not stated, so the absolute cost is unknowable.
Performance is conditioned on 48h client approvals — a delivery risk if the client cannot meet that SLA.
flags.evidence: creative approvals within 48 hours of request

flags.detail: No project timeline or milestones provided. RFQ questionnaire explicitly asks for this.

overall_summary: Launchpad is a full-service generalist covering all eight line items but several only at a vague, one-line level. It withholds a firm total ('final quote upon scope confirmation') while giving partial figures, makes an unsupported reach guarantee, and clearly states payment terms, timeline, and exclusions.

scope_notes.value: Launch platform, big idea, key visual, messaging.
scope_notes.evidence: Big idea, key visual, messaging, all of it

scope_notes.value: Scripts through to finished films (combined with production).
scope_notes.evidence: scripts through to finished films, hero + cutdowns

price.value: Combined with production: ₹90 lakh–₹1.1 Cr range
price.evidence: the TVC piece (dev + production) lands in the ₹90 lakh–₹1.1 Cr range

scope_notes.value: Finished films via production network; merged with development.
scope_notes.evidence: We've got an amazing production network

price.value: Combined with development; range only, depends on shoot scale

scope_notes.value: Vague: 'we'll handle social, don't worry' — calendars, assets, community named but not detailed.
scope_notes.evidence: we'll handle social, don't worry

scope_notes.value: Will plan paid media.
scope_notes.evidence: we'll plan it and run it

scope_notes.evidence: we'll plan it and run it

flags.evidence: We guarantee 10M+ organic reach in the first three months

flags.detail: No committed total; firm quote deferred to 'scope confirmation'. Buyer cannot evaluate true cost.
flags.evidence: we'll provide a final quote upon scope confirmation

flags.detail: Several line items covered only at a one-line, hand-wavy level ('we'll handle social, don't worry').
Compliance addressed only as a vague assurance; no ASCI process or sign-off, despite being a weighted RFQ requirement.

flags.detail: TVC dev and production merged into a single wide range (₹90L–₹1.1Cr), making true production cost hard to assess.
